code:
import io
import string

let maybe_line = io.read_line()
mut line = ""
match maybe_line
when Some(s)
  line = s
when None
  line = ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut best = ""
mut best_len = 0
mut current = ""
mut cur_len = 0
mut i = 0
while i <= n
  mut is_sep = true
  mut b = 0
  if i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      b = x
    when None
      b = 0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
      is_sep = true
    else
      is_sep = false
    end
  else
    is_sep = true
  end
  if is_sep
    if cur_len > best_len
      best = current
      best_len = cur_len
    end
    current = ""
    cur_len = 0
  else
    current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    cur_len = cur_len + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end

print("longest=#{best}")
